description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light wall finishes, with large rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors. The front yard is paved with concrete tiles and landscaped with several trees and shrubs, while the backyard includes a swimming pool, patio furniture, and additional greenery. The house has a prominent garage attached to one side, and the main entryway is set back from the street, accessible via a paved walkway. The overall layout is open and spacious, with outdoor living areas designed for relaxation and entertainment. The architectural style emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and landscaped front and back yards featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, garage, paved front yard, and several trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the light-colored walls, upper windows, and backyard patio with pool.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the swimming pool, patio furniture, and large glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dark exterior wall, upper windows, and the pool area extending from the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a paved walkway, no porch, and minimalistic modern styling
